scripts.test: npm run db:generate && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:skills: npm run db:generate && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand src/agent-skills/
scripts.test:skill:beam: npm run db:generate && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand src/agent-skills/structure-type/beam/
scripts.test:skill:frame: npm run db:generate && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand src/agent-skills/structure-type/frame/
scripts.test:skill:portal-frame: npm run db:generate && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand src/agent-skills/structure-type/portal-frame/
scripts.db:init: npm run db:deploy && prisma db seed
